# launchdarkly_experimentation_settings (Data Source)

Provides a LaunchDarkly experimentation settings data source.

This data source allows you to retrieve the randomization units configured for experiments in a project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "launchdarkly_experimentation_settings" "example" {
  project_key = "example-project"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_key` (String) The project key.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource. Equal to the project key.
- `randomization_units` (Attributes List) The randomization units allowed for experiments in this project. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--randomization_units))

<a id="nestedatt--randomization_units"></a>
### Nested Schema for `randomization_units`

Read-Only:

- `default` (Boolean) Whether new experiment iterations default to using this randomization unit.
- `randomization_unit` (String) The unit of randomization.
